overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic industrial district in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), moving from a sunlit sidewalk alongside a busy road into a covered pedestrian area beneath an elevated highway, with massive industrial refineries and corporate buildings visible in the background.

events.description: pedestrian in dark jacket walks past the camera from right to left
moving deeper under the overpass, shadows lengthen and green neon lights become visible overhead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk at the edge of an elevated highway, passing pedestrians and observing the industrial refinery ahead

notable_agents.action: person in orange shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction
person in dark jacket walking toward the camera and passing by

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure with green neon strip lighting underneath
tall industrial complex with multiple smokestacks emitting white smoke against blue sky
large industrial building with prominent red ARASAKA signage on the facade
tall black pole with traffic signals and orange street light fixture
multi-lane asphalt road with cars and trucks driving past

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk at the edge of an elevated highway in a futuristic industrial district. The massive refinery towers dominate the skyline ahead while vehicles pass on the right. Pedestrians walk in both directions, and the area transitions from bright sunlight to the shadow of the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: fully entering the covered area beneath the overpass, natural sunlight replaced by green neon illumination
industrial refinery tower exits view as camera focuses on building entrance ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the overpass toward a corporate building entrance with a circular logo, following the pedestrian in orange

notable_agents.action: person in orange shirt walking ahead toward the building entrance

entered.detail: rows of green fluorescent tube lights mounted on the underside of the overpass
building facade with large circular white logo and red illuminated entrance

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper under the elevated highway into a sheltered pedestrian zone illuminated by green neon lights. The industrial backdrop gives way to a corporate building entrance with a distinctive circular logo. The space feels more enclosed with the overpass overhead, while the road continues to the right with occasional traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit industrial sidewalk into the neon-lit shadows of a sheltered pedestrian zone. It begins by walking along a concrete path at the edge of an elevated highway, where massive refinery towers dominate the skyline and vehicles stream past on the right. As the camera moves forward, the bright daylight fades as the path transitions into the deep shadow of the overpass. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed environment illuminated by green neon lights, where the industrial backdrop is replaced by a corporate building entrance featuring a distinctive circular logo. Finally, the camera continues deeper under the highway structure while the road remains visible to the right with occasional traffic.
